name: Spike Shield
description: Spike Shields retaliate when you are struck by a melee attack, dealing elemental spike damage back to the attacker. They are niche, but can shine in close-quarters fights against melee-focused groups, steadily punishing enemies that keep pressing into you.
notes: Much less effective against enemies that stay at range, as the spike effect only triggers on melee hits.

special.description: Taking melee damage triggers elemental spike damage to the attacker.
